examples.code:
import os, requests

requests.post(
    "https://app.aldo-ai.dev/v1/integrations",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['ALDO_API_KEY']}"},
    json={},
)

errors.description: API key lacks the required scope or role.
Request body or query failed Zod validation.
Resource does not exist (or belongs to another tenant).
Too many requests. Honour the `Retry-After` header.
Server error. Include the `request_id` when reporting.
